tools.name: Microsoft Graph - Outlook

operations.Name: listOutlookMessages
operations.Label: listOutlookMessages

Parameters.name: $select
Parameters.description: Comma-separated fields to return, for example id,subject,from,receivedDateTime,bodyPreview,isRead.

Parameters.name: $filter
Parameters.description: OData filter, for example isRead eq false.

Parameters.name: $orderby
Parameters.description: OData order by, for example receivedDateTime desc.

operations.Desc: List messages in the signed-in user's mailbox.

operations.Name: createOutlookDraftMessage
operations.Label: createOutlookDraftMessage
operations.Desc: Create a draft email message.

operations.Name: getOutlookMessage
operations.Label: getOutlookMessage
operations.Desc: Get a single email message by ID.

operations.Name: updateOutlookMessage
operations.Label: updateOutlookMessage
operations.Desc: Update message properties such as read status or importance.

operations.Name: deleteOutlookMessage
operations.Label: deleteOutlookMessage
operations.Desc: Delete an email message.

operations.Name: sendOutlookMail
operations.Label: sendOutlookMail
operations.Desc: Send an email message from the signed-in user's mailbox.

operations.Name: sendOutlookDraftMessage
operations.Label: sendOutlookDraftMessage
operations.Desc: Send an existing draft message.

operations.Name: replyToOutlookMessage
operations.Label: replyToOutlookMessage
operations.Desc: Reply to an email message.

operations.Name: replyAllToOutlookMessage
operations.Label: replyAllToOutlookMessage
operations.Desc: Reply all to an email message.

operations.Name: forwardOutlookMessage
operations.Label: forwardOutlookMessage
operations.Desc: Forward an email message.

operations.Name: moveOutlookMessage
operations.Label: moveOutlookMessage

destinationId.description: Destination mail folder ID, such as inbox, archive, deleteditems, or a folder ID.

operations.Desc: Move an email message to another mail folder.

operations.Name: listOutlookMessagesInFolder
operations.Label: listOutlookMessagesInFolder

Parameters.name: folder-id
Parameters.description: Mail folder ID, for example inbox, sentitems, drafts, deleteditems, archive, or a folder ID.

operations.Desc: List messages in a specific Outlook mail folder.

operations.Name: listOutlookCalendars
operations.Label: listOutlookCalendars
operations.Desc: List calendars for the signed-in user.

operations.Name: listOutlookEvents
operations.Label: listOutlookEvents
operations.Desc: List events in the signed-in user's default calendar.

operations.Name: createOutlookEvent
operations.Label: createOutlookEvent
operations.Desc: Create an event in the signed-in user's default calendar.

operations.Name: getOutlookEvent
operations.Label: getOutlookEvent
operations.Desc: Get a calendar event by ID.

operations.Name: updateOutlookEvent
operations.Label: updateOutlookEvent
operations.Desc: Update a calendar event.

operations.Name: deleteOutlookEvent
operations.Label: deleteOutlookEvent
operations.Desc: Delete a calendar event.

operations.Name: listOutlookCalendarView
operations.Label: listOutlookCalendarView
operations.Desc: List calendar events in a date/time range.

operations.Name: listOutlookEventsInCalendar
operations.Label: listOutlookEventsInCalendar
operations.Desc: List events in a specific calendar.

operations.Name: createOutlookEventInCalendar
operations.Label: createOutlookEventInCalendar
operations.Desc: Create an event in a specific calendar.

operations.Name: acceptOutlookEvent
operations.Label: acceptOutlookEvent
operations.Desc: Accept a meeting invitation.

operations.Name: declineOutlookEvent
operations.Label: declineOutlookEvent
operations.Desc: Decline a meeting invitation.

operations.Name: tentativelyAcceptOutlookEvent
operations.Label: tentativelyAcceptOutlookEvent
operations.Desc: Tentatively accept a meeting invitation.

tools.name: SharePoint Data Operations

operations.Name: getSharePointSiteByPath
operations.Label: getSharePointSiteByPath

Parameters.name: relative-path
Parameters.description: Server-relative site path, for example sites/HR

operations.Desc: Resolve a SharePoint site and return its Microsoft Graph site ID.

operations.Name: listSharePointListItems
operations.Label: listSharePointListItems

Parameters.name: $expand
Parameters.description: Use fields to include column values, for example: fields.

Parameters.name: $top
Parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

operations.Desc: Get items from a SharePoint list.

operations.Name: createSharePointListItem
operations.Label: createSharePointListItem
operations.Desc: Create a new item in a SharePoint list.

operations.Name: getSharePointListItem
operations.Label: getSharePointListItem

Parameters.name: $expand
Parameters.description: Use fields to include column values.

operations.Desc: Get a single item in a SharePoint list.

operations.Name: updateSharePointListItemFields
operations.Label: updateSharePointListItemFields

RequestBody.description: Field values to update on a SharePoint list item.

operations.Desc: Update column values on a SharePoint list item.

operations.Name: listDocumentLibraryRootItems
operations.Label: listDocumentLibraryRootItems
operations.Desc: List files and folders in the root of a SharePoint document library.

operations.Name: getDocumentLibraryItem
operations.Label: getDocumentLibraryItem
operations.Desc: Get metadata for a file or folder in a SharePoint document library.

operations.Name: updateDocumentLibraryItem
operations.Label: updateDocumentLibraryItem
operations.Desc: Update metadata for a file or folder in a SharePoint document library.

operations.Name: createDocumentLibraryFolder
operations.Label: createDocumentLibraryFolder
operations.Desc: Create a folder under a parent folder in a SharePoint document library.

operations.Name: <REDACTED_TOKEN_LIKE_VALUE>
operations.Label: <REDACTED_TOKEN_LIKE_VALUE>
operations.Desc: Upload a new small file to a SharePoint document library using a parent folder item ID.

operations.Name: <REDACTED_TOKEN_LIKE_VALUE>
operations.Label: <REDACTED_TOKEN_LIKE_VALUE>
operations.Desc: Upload a small file to the root of the default SharePoint document library for a site without requiring a parent ID.

operations.Name: <REDACTED_TOKEN_LIKE_VALUE>
operations.Label: <REDACTED_TOKEN_LIKE_VALUE>

Parameters.name: folder-path
Parameters.description: Folder path inside the document library, for example Quotations/2026.

operations.Desc: Upload a small file to a folder path inside the default SharePoint document library without requiring a parent ID.
